panels.title: Latest Sweep
panels.description: When the last spectrum sweep completed

targets.rawSql: SELECT toUnixTimestamp64Milli(max(timestamp)) AS last_sweep FROM spectrum.scans

panels.title: Freq Bins
panels.description: Number of frequency bins in the latest sweep

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS bins FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.scans ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1)

panels.title: Sweeps Today
panels.description: Number of completed sweeps since midnight

targets.rawSql: SELECT uniq(sweep_id) AS sweeps FROM spectrum.scans WHERE timestamp > today()

panels.title: Clipped Sweeps (24h)
panels.description: Sweeps where any bin exceeded -3 dBFS — indicates ADC saturation

targets.rawSql: SELECT countIf(max_power > -3) AS clipped FROM spectrum.sweep_health WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

panels.title: Current Power Spectrum
panels.description: Power vs frequency from the latest sweep (88-470 MHz)

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat(toString(round(freq_hz / 1000000.0, 1)), ' MHz') AS freq, power_dbfs FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.scans ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY freq_hz

panels.title: RF Waterfall
panels.description: Power over time per 10 MHz band — each line is a frequency band, color shows relative power

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfInterval(timestamp, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) AS time, max(power_dbfs) AS value, concat(toString(intDiv(freq_hz, 10000000) * 10), ' MHz') AS metric FROM spectrum.scans WHERE timestamp >= $__fromTime AND timestamp <= $__toTime AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' GROUP BY time, intDiv(freq_hz, 10000000) ORDER BY time, intDiv(freq_hz, 10000000)

panels.title: Signal Power Over Time
panels.description: Power at known frequencies over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.timestamp AS time, s.power_dbfs AS value, kf.name AS metric FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) AND s.timestamp >= $__fromTime AND s.timestamp <= $__toTime AND kf.category IN ('airband', 'marine', 'tetra', 'ism') ORDER BY time

panels.title: Active Known Frequencies
panels.description: Which known signals are currently detected with their power levels

targets.rawSql: SELECT kf.name, kf.category, round(kf.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 3) AS freq_mhz, kf.modulation, round(s.power_dbfs, 1) AS power_dbfs FROM spectrum.known_frequencies kf CROSS JOIN (SELECT freq_hz, power_dbfs FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.scans ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1)) s WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) ORDER BY power_dbfs DESC

panels.title: Z-Score Anomalies
panels.description: Frequencies with unusual power relative to their rolling 20-sweep average — z > 3 means statistically unusual

targets.rawSql: WITH recent AS (SELECT freq_hz, power_dbfs, timestamp, sweep_id, avg(power_dbfs) OVER (PARTITION BY freq_hz ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 20 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS mean_20, stddevPop(power_dbfs) OVER (PARTITION BY freq_hz ORDER BY timestamp ROWS BETWEEN 20 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS std_20 FROM spectrum.scans WHERE timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR AND sweep_id LIKE 'full:%') SELECT timestamp, round(freq_hz / 1000000, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(mean_20, 1) AS baseline, round(std_20, 1) AS std_dev, round((power_dbfs - mean_20) / if(std_20 < 0.5, 0.5, std_20), 1) AS z_score FROM recent WHERE sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.scans WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) AND abs((power_dbfs - mean_20) / if(std_20 < 0.5, 0.5, std_20)) > 3 ORDER BY abs((power_dbfs - mean_20) / if(std_20 < 0.5, 0.5, std_20)) DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Detected Peaks
panels.description: Spectral peaks from the latest sweep — bins significantly above their neighbors

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(p.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(p.power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(p.prominence_db, 1) AS prominence_db FROM spectrum.peaks p WHERE p.sweep_id = (SELECT sweep_id FROM spectrum.peaks WHERE sweep_id LIKE 'full:%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1) ORDER BY p.prominence_db DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Signal Events
panels.description: Signals that appeared or disappeared between sweeps (transients)

targets.rawSql: SELECT e.timestamp, e.event_type, round(e.freq_hz / 1000000.0, 2) AS freq_mhz, round(e.power_dbfs, 1) AS power, round(e.prev_power, 1) AS prev_power, round(e.delta_db, 1) AS delta_db FROM spectrum.events e ORDER BY e.timestamp DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Airband Activity
panels.description: Power at Athens ATC frequencies (fast 60s airband sweep)

targets.rawSql: SELECT s.timestamp AS time, s.power_dbfs AS value, kf.name AS metric FROM spectrum.scans s CROSS JOIN spectrum.known_frequencies kf WHERE abs(toInt64(s.freq_hz) - toInt64(kf.freq_hz)) <= toInt64(greatest(kf.bandwidth_hz / 2, 50000)) AND s.timestamp >= $__fromTime AND s.timestamp <= $__toTime AND kf.category = 'airband' AND s.sweep_id LIKE 'airband:%' ORDER BY time
